title: 4 1 Double Integrals
body:
TOPIC 4 : DOUBLE INTEGRATION 4.1 DOUBLE INTEGRALS

The integral of the function f (x, y) over the region of integration is given by Z Z f (x, y)dA. Ω

The infinitesimal area dA is given by dA = dx dy if the x integral is carried out first and dA = dy dx if the y integral is first.

Rb RR Comparison of a f (x)dx and Ω f (x, y)dy dx.

When evaluating double integrals a few things to keep in mind are:

• We calculate the inside integral first and the outside integral second.

• The limits of integration of the outside integral must be constants.

• The limits of the inside integral can be constants or functions of the outer variable.

R1R2 Example 1 Evaluate 0 0 12x2 y 3 dy dx.

F 16 F R 1 R x2 2 3 Example 2 Evaluate 0 x 12x y dy dx.

F − 12 F

A crucial skill is the ability to express the region of integration Ω in terms of appropriate limits for the double integral. You should always sketch Ω in the x-y plane first!

We always have a choice over whether we use dA = dx dy or dA = dy dx, that is, whether you carry out the x or y integral first. The result is the same either way, but it is often the case that one approach is significantly quicker than the other! RR Example 3 Evaluate Ω 3y dA where Ω = {(x, y) : 0 ≤ x ≤ 3 and 0 ≤ y ≤ 2}

We will use both dA = dxdy and as a check dA = dydx.

F 18 F

Question: What is the geometrical significance of this answer?

RR Question: Can Ω f (x, y) dA < 0?

RR Example 4 Evaluate Ω x2 + xy dA where Ω is the region in the x-y plane bounded by y = x and y = x2 .

To evaluate general double integrals where the limits are not explicitly given:

• Draw Ω.

• Trace a line parallel to the inner variable to determine the inner limits.

• Consider how much you can move the tracer line to determine the outer limits.

• Check that the outer limits must be constants and the inner limits can be constants or functions of the outer variable.

We will once again use both dA = dx dy and dA = dy dx. In practice, we just need to do it one way. It might be that one way is much easier than then other!

F 120 F

Another very important skill is changing the order of integration in a double integral. When doing this it is absolutely essential to first sketch the region of integration. RπRπ Example 5 Evaluate 0 x sin(y) y dydx by first changing the order of integration. Note firstly that the integral is impossible to evaluate directly!

F 2 F

R 1 R 1 √ x2 Example 6 Evaluate 0 y2 2 xe dxdy by first changing the order of integration.

F e−1 F You can now do Q 64 and 66
